0:{"rsc":["$","$1","c",{"children":[[["$","h1",null,{"children":"Scratchpad"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"A temporary workspace for reasoning, planning, and intermediate computations. Session-bound and cleared on agent restart."}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Use Cases"}],"\n",["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Chain-of-thought reasoning"}],": Step-by-step problem solving"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Planning"}],": Task decomposition and sequencing"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Scratch calculations"}],": Temporary math or data transformation"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Draft responses"}],": Iterative response refinement"]}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"API"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"code":"# Write to scratchpad\nmem.scratchpad.write(\n  content=\"Step 1: Parse the user's request...\",\n  category=\"reasoning\",\n)\n\n# Read current scratchpad\nentries = mem.scratchpad.read()\n\n# Clear scratchpad\nmem.scratchpad.clear()\n\n# Flush insights to Working Memory\nmem.scratchpad.flush_to_working(tags=[\"insight\"])\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Lifecycle"}],"\n",["$","$L3",null,{"chart":"\nflowchart LR\n  A[Agent Start] -->|create| SP[Scratchpad]\n  SP -->|write/read| SP\n  SP -->|flush| WM[Working Memory]\n  WM -->|agent uses| A\n  A -->|shutdown| DEL[Discard Scratchpad]\n"}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Configuration"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["| Parameter | Default | Description |\n|-----------|---------|-------------|\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"scratchpad_max"}]," | ",["$","code",null,{"children":"100"}]," | Maximum entries |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"scratchpad_auto_flush"}]," | ",["$","code",null,{"children":"True"}]," | Auto-flush on shutdown |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"scratchpad_flush_threshold"}]," | ",["$","code",null,{"children":"0.7"}]," | Importance threshold for flush |"]}],"\n",["$","div",null,{"className":"callout callout-warning","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-start Only explicitly flushed insights survive. Do not store critical information solely in the scratchpad."}]}]]}]]}]}]],[["$","script","script-0",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/06qv3~~e._cb6.js","async":true}],["$","script","script-1",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0nuipubmwenwa.js","async":true}],["$","script","script-2",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0fekzj03ltn5y.js","async":true}],["$","script","script-3",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0pqew2nbfoy2f.js","async":true}],["$","script","script-4",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/07.05twov8012.js","async":true}],["$","script","script-5",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/113wy2s~ukj5p.js","async":true}],["$","script","script-6",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0se1rt9lzyib_.js","async":true}],["$","script","script-7",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0e1gsufr5shdc.js","async":true}],["$","script","script-8",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/13n60-fppanm4.js","async":true}],["$","script","script-9",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0g~f0923b0wjv.js","async":true}]],["$","$L5",null,{"children":["$","$6",null,{"name":"Next.MetadataOutlet","children":"$@7"}]}]]}],"isPartial":false,"staleTime":300,"varyParams":null,"buildId":"oLBkLcipfllBBS_uEwuBd"}
